representative_sources.label: Nevada DSS Program Offices
representative_sources.evidence: The Program Offices page preserves county-named local partners for 11 Nevada county-equivalents.

representative_sources.label: Clark County Social Service Senior Services
representative_sources.evidence: Clark County Social Service explicitly supports low-income seniors and individuals with disabilities.

representative_sources.label: Washoe County Human Services Agency
representative_sources.evidence: Washoe County preserves a county-owned Human Services Agency route with first-party adult and children services navigation.

representative_sources.label: Humboldt County Public Transportation Services
representative_sources.evidence: Humboldt County prioritizes rides for seniors and ADA-certified disabled persons and preserves county contact routing.

representative_sources.label: Esmeralda County Senior Transportation
representative_sources.evidence: Esmeralda County preserves local medical transport schedules and dispatch contacts on the first-party county host.

representative_sources.label: Storey County Health & Community Services
representative_sources.evidence: Storey County says Health and Community Services serves all communities within Storey County and lists senior-center contacts.

representative_sources.label: Lander County Senior Center
representative_sources.evidence: Lander County preserves an exact Senior Center director, address, and phone on the first-party county host.

representative_sources.label: Lander County Austin Community & Medical Center
representative_sources.evidence: Lander County states the Austin Community Center & Clinic will provide local healthcare services for residents of Lander County.
